summary: Added a read-only doctor envelope to the Jeffrey corpus daily diff renderer so it can report jq, input snapshot, and output-parent readiness without rendering or mutating a report.

proof.summary: 6/0 assertions: help/examples advertise doctor, doctor emits jeff-daily-diff-render.doctor.v1 with mutates=false, missing input warns, readable input passes, and markdown rendering still works from a fixture snapshot.
Touched renderer and test surfaces are ShellCheck clean.
Inventory regenerated; jeff-daily-corpus-diff-render.sh now reports doctor_subcommand_status=basic instead of absent.

parent_state.reason: The broader doctor-mode wave remains open; this closes one scoped Jeffrey corpus renderer surface only.
